title: Messaging Basics
drDigitalIntro:
Messages is how you text on your computer.
• Start a new message with someone in your Contacts.
• Type your message and press Enter to send.
• Each conversation stays in the list, and it syncs with your phone.

steps.say: Click on Alex to open their conversation.
Type a reply to Alex and send it.

drDigitalSuccess: Message sent! You just texted from your computer — it works exactly like texting from your phone.
drDigitalHint: Click Alex in the left panel, type anything in the box at the bottom, and press Enter or click Send.
